note: Executable confirmatory predicates and a predicate-selected interpretation matrix. Wording is chosen by the first matched predicate under a fixed priority order, so language is NOT written post-hoc after inspecting results. No auto best-beta selection; primary beta=0.5 is fixed by the primary contract.

estimator_conventions.family_reduction: average checkpoints within family, then equal-family mean over complete families
estimator_conventions.delta_sft: Delta_SFT(f,R) = mean over checkpoints in f of mean_r [ M(i,SFT,R,c_i_study,r) - M(i,U,R,c_i_study) ]
estimator_conventions.preservation: P(f,R) = mean over checkpoints in f of mean_r [ M(i,KL,R,c_i_study,r) - M(i,SFT,R,c_i_study,r) ] (seed-paired)
estimator_conventions.lcb: one-sided 97.5% bootstrap lower confidence bound from the hierarchical paired Poisson family bootstrap (model identities fixed)

multiplicity.per_family_two_sided_equivalent: one-sided 97.5% lower bound per family-level intersection rule

confirmatory_families.intersection_rule: a family is SUPPORTED only if ALL of its predicate LCB conditions hold jointly (intersection-union across the predicates within the family)

H_gain.meaning: ordinary SFT has a positive equal-family represented-source gain

H_conc.meaning: represented-source movement exceeds adaptation-held-out movement (further specialization / concentration)

H_preserve.meaning: KL-SFT preserves more adaptation-held-out macro-AP than seed-paired ordinary SFT

H_cost.meaning: KL-SFT's represented-source cost is within the non-inferiority margin m

non_inferiority.rationale: two units of the report's 0.01 practical tie band; substantive maximum tolerated represented-source loss; not estimated from results

beta_policy.verdict_wording_selection: predicate-driven only; never handwritten after inspection

interpretation_matrix.selection: evaluate rows in ascending priority order; emit the wording of the FIRST row whose predicate is TRUE. Priorities are disjoint per decision block so exactly one row fires per block.

rows.wording: The preregistered further-specialization hypothesis was not supported; checkpoint-level movements remain descriptive.

rows.predicate: LCB(H_gain) > 0 AND LCB(H_conc) > 0 AND point_estimate(mean_f Delta_SFT(f, held_out)) <= 0
rows.wording: Our ordinary SFT protocol further specialized these released guards toward represented sources, with no mean held-out gain.

rows.predicate: LCB(H_gain) > 0 AND LCB(H_conc) > 0 AND point_estimate(mean_f Delta_SFT(f, held_out)) > 0
rows.wording: The gains are concentrated toward represented sources, but there is no absolute mean held-out loss.
The preregistered anti-forgetting hypothesis was not supported under the locked coefficient and recipe.
KL-SFT trades adaptation gain for retention; it is not a free improvement.
Anchoring to the released guard preserved more transfer at an acceptable represented cost.

rows.predicate: any Gamma_a_R paired interval excludes zero (descriptive fixed-panel interaction)
rows.wording: The two fixed panels responded differently (not: purpose-built training caused the difference).

rows.predicate: all Gamma_a_R paired intervals cross zero
rows.wording: The fixed general and purpose-built panels did not show a resolved difference in adaptation movement on this panel.

rows.predicate: any preregistered pairwise sign-reversal across benchmark or contract with paired interval excluding zero, OR top-1 turnover > 0 outside the tie band
rows.wording: Neither purpose-built initialization nor KL-SFT eliminates benchmark/contract dependence.

rows.predicate: no preregistered pairwise difference is resolved outside the tie band and no top-1 turnover
rows.wording: The ranking-fragility extension was not supported on this fixed panel.

rows.predicate: any checkpoint with resolved study-native top-level gain AND resolved official-native validity/performance loss (N_a < 0 with interval excluding zero, or schema validity below locked threshold)
rows.wording: The adaptation overwrote part of the released guard contract.
All generalization claims remain retrospective and estimation-only.

narrow_or_stop_cross_type_claim_if: fewer than three purpose-built families pass the harmonized contract-preserving preflight
architecture-specific target/module changes are needed for most purpose-built checkpoints
native parser failure prevents a valid top-level score or the locked retention measurements
only hard labels with large ties can be obtained
stop_narrow_gates.fallback: retain checkpoint-level guard -> guard+SFT -> guard+KL-SFT case studies and native-contract retention; omit the pooled starting-type interaction
